question: What is the TV Channel that shows the cartoon "The Rise of the Blue Beetle!"? List the TV Channel's series name.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.series_name FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN Cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T2.Title = "The Rise of the Blue Beetle!";
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.text_3, T1.text_1 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T2 ON T1.pk_1 = T2.fk_1 WHERE T2.text_1 = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!'
raw_response: SELECT T1.text_3, T1.text_1 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T2 ON T1.pk_1 = T2.fk_1 WHERE T2.text_1 = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!'
